unexpected_finds.summary: T1 Phase 2 verdict (UPGRADE_PARTIAL_FORMAL_LEVEL at bridge 37c939f) did NOT identify the protocol-to-stratum mismatch finding; the existing Phase 2 verdict frames the d≥3 gap as 'requiring borderline-locus mechanism (i')' and recommends Phase 3 lift work without flagging the deg_a = 0 vs {d-1, d, d+1} convention disconnect. The synthesizer-substitute verdict surfaces this as a NEW finding from substrate-survey.
unexpected_finds.implication: T1 Phase 3 sub-task 3-A becomes a HIGHER-PRIORITY pre-condition than the original Phase 3 'borderline-case algebraic + analytic structure' lift work.

unexpected_finds.summary: PCF-1 v1.3 §6 Theorem 5 d=2 split between QL01-QL26 (A=3, lower branch) and V_quad (A=4, upper branch) may, per rubber-duck citation, be a CONVENTION SPLIT (deg_a = 1 for QL01-QL26 vs deg_a = 0 for V_quad) rather than a structural anomaly requiring borderline-locus interpretation. Under WZ normal case at deg_a = 1, A_naive = 2d-1 = 3 (matches QL01-QL26); at deg_a = 0, A_naive = 2d = 4 (matches V_quad). This is a SECONDARY observation; not independently verified by T2 this session; rubber-duck cited algebraic_independence_audit.py:37-40 as evidence for V_quad's deg_a = 0 nature.
unexpected_finds.implication: If V_quad's convention is independently verified, bt_baseline_note v1.x §4.2 d=2 verification framing may also need revision (currently treats V_quad's A=4 as 'consistent with mechanism (i')' rather than as a different convention). Flagged for canonical T1-Synth W20 weekly re-arbitration.

unexpected_finds.summary: The PCF-2 cubic harvest's bin labels '+_S3_real', '+_C3_real', '-_S3_CM' (in wkb_cubic_harvest_v2.tex L11-50) classify by Galois group of b_n's resolvent cubic. Under Conjecture B4', a 2d-1 vs 2d split was predicted to track this Galois classification. Empirically B4' was FALSIFIED at d=3 (all 50 representatives gave A_fit ≈ 6, regardless of bin). Under the protocol-to-stratum mismatch finding, B4''s falsification is naturally explained: the harvest's deg_a = 0 directly predicts A_naive = 2d for ALL bins (no dependence on Galois classification), consistent with the empirical FALSIFICATION of B4's bin-dependent split.
unexpected_finds.implication: Q1 verdict's PROTOCOL_TO_STRATUM_MISMATCH framing is internally consistent with PCF-2 v1.3's own B4' falsification record; provides additional substrate-side support beyond the cf_value() inspection.
